ab: Miqumicang, nadasun ata haip tataqu’ munca’an acang macingav is madadaingaz.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: Uu, namalasbunun azam muskun madadaingaz pababazbaz.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說布農語。
en: B: Okay! We’re going to speak Bunun to the seniors.
A: Are we almost there?
B:Almost there.
A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: Paqas! maqanciap qana amu malabununi! mantan macial.
ch: B:你們會說布農語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You speak Bunyan! That’s great!

ab: Miqumicang, nadasun amu haip tataqu’ makamaduq.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.
B: Yes, sir.

ab: Mu’amina maipadi masandailaz, ka’a tu minpungul madas is naiskukuza.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: Uu, tataqu’, mala’aminin ca naiskukuza zami.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.
A: Are we there yet?
B: Not yet, it’s still far away.
A: You go watering.
B: Okay, I’ll water it.
A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: Uu, namaipata azak pusmai kis luqai’.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: Miqumicang, namunca’an ata haip saipukan is tusmumut tantungu.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?
A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: Mu’amina macial masandailaz, namabaliv ata kipu’.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.
B: Yes.

ab: Maca tantangaus a luqai’, maca antanhiku’ a ivut, anaka amu saduu.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.
B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: Nitu Makua, nipin asu sadu luqai’ ca.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: Maca muqnin ta’a tatnulan a mucuqais ata maipati mu’inun.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.
B: Yes, thank you.
A: What did you see today?

ab: Madia sala ca luqai’ ciin ivut sadu’an zaku.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.
A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: Muluang tukuc, mamuqu’ ca mantac i naak.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.
A: Shall we go swimming together?
B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: Madia sala ca bunun haanti tunhapavi.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: Kumbu’ sala ca danum ha’an aiza, maqtu’in ca ha’anti ata tunhapav.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
